lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: I have all the bad luck. My sheep all run off somewhere, and then those mourners tell me they're infected!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I hope things start to look up for you.

sections.title: After the completion of Sheep Herder

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Sorry about your sheep...

lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: That's okay, it had to be done for the sake of the town.

sections.title: After the completion of Song of the Elves

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Sorry about your sheep...

lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: That's okay, you are not to blame. I'm just glad the truth behind the plague was eventually revealed.
